# `energy/state_atc_losses_pct`

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by `python -m yen_gov indicator-pages`. Do not hand-edit. -->

**Title**: Aggregate Technical & Commercial losses (%, by state)  
**One-line**: Combined technical losses (transmission + distribution heat and ageing-equipment losses) and commercial losses (theft + billing/collection inefficiencies) as a percentage of total energy input to the distribution system.  
**Last Updated**: 2026-05-15T21:11:07Z (auto-generated)  
**Source artifact**: [`datasets/indicators/in/energy/state_atc_losses_pct.json`](../../../../datasets/indicators/in/energy/state_atc_losses_pct.json)

## Definition

Combined technical losses (transmission + distribution heat and ageing-equipment losses) and commercial losses (theft + billing/collection inefficiencies) as a percentage of total energy input to the distribution system. The headline measure of distribution-utility operational health: lower is better.

## Coverage

- **Temporal**: 2015-04..2024-04 (10 periods)
- **Spatial**: All-India aggregate; 28 states; 8 UTs (37 entities)
- **Rows on disk**: 344

## Methodology vintage

NITI Aayog ICED state-wise deep-dive API; payload fetched 2026-05-14T07:51:49Z; 10 fiscal years, 344 rows.

## Notes

Source: NITI Aayog ICED dashboard, row 'AT&C Losses'. Calculated by PFC. The Government's UDAY targets envisaged AT&C losses below 15% all-India by 2018-19; the actual all-India figure has hovered around 15% since then.
